# Table 12 (sheets 1 to 12)
# Thermodynamic functions
# PRE  [atm]     - pressure from 100 to 1000 atm
# TEMP [K]       - temperature from 5000 to 110000 K
# RHO  [g/ccm]   - density
# E    [cal/g]   - internal energy
# Cv   [cal/g/K] - specific heat at constant volume
# Cp   [cal/g/K] - specific heat at constant pressure
#
